summary: Phase 2 Guardian AI testing complete. All features working correctly. Fixed 2 bugs found during testing.
passed_tests: Guardian landing page: Shows security badges (AES-256 Encrypted, Zero-Knowledge Vault, SOC 2 Compliant)
Guardian landing page: Shows legal disclaimer box ('Not Legal Advice')
Guardian landing page: Updated description mentions 'encrypted vault' and 'all 50 U.S. states'
Guardian landing page: Lock icon badge on bot avatar
Guardian landing page: Quick action buttons (Analyze Vault, Generate Checklist, Readiness Score) visible
Guardian landing page: Recent conversations list shows and sessions can be resumed
Guardian chat view: Header shows 'AES-256 encrypted session' indicator with shield/lock icons
Guardian chat view: Has 'Export Checklist PDF' button (ListChecks icon) in header
Guardian chat view: Has 'Export Estate PDF' button (FileDown icon) in header
Guardian chat view: Footer shows 'Encrypted session · Not legal advice · Consult a licensed attorney'
Guardian chat: New chat welcome message mentions 'encrypted vault' persona

Guardian chat: AI responses include legal disclaimer at the bottom (---
This analysis is provided...)
Guardian chat: Grok-like persona tone is evident in responses (direct, conversational)
POST /api/guardian/export-checklist: Returns valid PDF file with checklist items
POST /api/guardian/export-checklist: Requires authentication (401 without token)
POST /api/chat/guardian: Legal disclaimer appended to every response
POST /api/chat/guardian action=generate_checklist: Works and adds checklist items
POST /api/chat/guardian action=analyze_readiness: Returns readiness score breakdown
GET /api/chat/sessions: Returns user's chat sessions list
GET /api/chat/history/{session_id}: Session resumption works correctly

bugs_fixed.issue: Legal disclaimer was stripped from generate_checklist response when cleaning JSON block
bugs_fixed.fix: Added LEGAL_DISCLAIMER to the cleaned response after checklist success message

bugs_fixed.issue: PDF export failed with FPDFUnicodeEncodingException when checklist items contained Unicode characters (em-dash, smart quotes)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added sanitize_for_pdf() helper function to replace Unicode characters with ASCII equivalents before adding to PDF

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test estate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Guardian AI features fully tested and working. All PDF exports, legal disclaimers, security badges, and chat features verified. Two bugs were fixed: 1) Legal disclaimer missing from generate_checklist response, 2) PDF export failing on Unicode characters. The test_analyze_vault_action occasionally times out (502) due to xAI API latency - this is transient.

mocked_apis.note: xAI Grok is live AI provider - not mocked
